case_title: HYGEIA MARKETING ASSOCIATES INC., vs. BRAJATAMA INC., et al

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION FILED WITHOUT PREJUDICE BY PLT. HYGEIA MARKETING. STRIKEN PER COURT ORDER OF 3/18/94
LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 06, MOTION FOR ENTRY OF STIPULATED JUDGMENT., CALENDAR OF MAR-31-1994, GRANTED PURSUANT TO WRITTEN ORDER PLTF. TO FILE MEMO OF COSTS

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BRAJATAMA INC. WIBOWO, PAULUS $6,929.71 PRINCIPAL, $1,356.25 ATTORNEY FEES, $125.60 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,411.56
